ai_summary: Chemplast Sanmar Limited reported a minor fire on July 17, 2026, at its Ethylene-Di-Chloride (EDC) manufacturing plant, confirming no casualties and that damages are adequately covered by insurance. While operations are being restored and damage assessed, the full extent of the impact on equipment and estimated production loss, along with a timeline for operational resumption, remain undisclosed. This lack of specific details regarding operational downtime and potential production shortfall represents a key uncertainty despite the insurance coverage.
